title: aquilegia vulgaris subsp. bertolonii
intro: Aquilegia vulgaris subsp. bertolonii, also known as the alpine columbine or Bertoloni's columbine, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Aquilegia vulgaris subsp. bertolonii include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
